files.notes: This file contains two main articles: 'Notes from the Field' by Amy Brown Lyman which includes program information and field reports from various stakes and missions, and 'Guide Lessons for October' which contains four lessons covering Theology and Testimony, Work and Business, Literature, and Social Service. The Guide Lessons section includes detailed lesson plans with questions and problems.

files.notes: This file contains four distinct lesson sections from the Guide Lessons for October, covering Theology, Work and Business, Literature, and Social Service. Each lesson has its own questions and problems section. The Work and Business lesson (Lesson II) appears to be just a header with no content.
